output: Implemented the rework for the timeline multi-select type surface and re-verified the branch with a throwaway reproduction compile, `npx tsc --noEmit`, and the full `npm test` suite. Manual runtime telemetry and browser smoke checks remain deferred because no browser-driving path was available in this session.
commands_run:
cat > src/__repro_timeline_multiselect_type.ts <<'EOF'
import type { TimelineEditorOpsContextValue } from '@/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineState.types';

type MultiSelectMembers = Pick<
  TimelineEditorOpsContextValue,
  | 'isClipSelected'
  | 'selectClip'
  | 'selectClips'
  | 'replaceTimelineSelection'
  | 'addToSelection'
  | 'clearSelection'
>;

export const check: MultiSelectMembers | null = null;
EOF
npx tsc --noEmit
status=$?
rm src/__repro_timeline_multiselect_type.ts
exit $status
